provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content: (1) This Act may be cited as the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) Act. (2) Section two shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st April, 1993. (3) Section three shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st September, 1993.

provisions.title: Salary
provisions.content: The holder of an office specified in the first column of the Schedule shall be paid a salary at the annual rate prescribed for that office in the second column of the Schedule. [As amended by Act No. 20 of 1995 and Act No. 25 of 1996 ] First Schedule (Section 2) Column 1 Column 2 Office Secretary to the Cabinet Salary per Annumm K Attorney-General 6,185,316 Investigator-General 6,120,876 Auditor-General 6,120,876 Solicitor-General 5,726,232 Director of Public Prosecution 5,282,288 [As amended by Act No. 20 of 1995 and Act No. 25 of 1996 ] History of this document 12 August 2009 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendments) Act, 2009 01 January 2008 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2008 01 April 2007 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2007 01 April 2005 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2005 01 April 2002 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2002 01 November 2000 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2000 28 December 1998 amendment not yet applied Amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 1998 31 December 1996 this version Consolidation 24 December 1993 Commenced Related documents Is amended by Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 1998 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2000 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2002 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2005 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2007 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendment) Act, 2008 Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) (Amendments) Act, 2009 Subsidiary legislation Title Constitutional Offices Emoluments Regulations, 2018 Statutory Instrument 64 of 2018 [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Subscribe Subscribe to our newsletter for updates and news.
